phrases.en: When the gauge is low, Dan drives to the gas station.
phrases.zh: 当油表显示油量很低时，丹开车去加油站。

phrases.en: He pulls up slowly next to an empty pump.
phrases.zh: 他缓缓地把车停在一个空着的油泵旁。

phrases.en: He turns off the engine and sets the parking brake.
phrases.zh: 他熄掉发动机，拉起手刹。

phrases.en: He walks into the kiosk and pays the friendly cashier first.
phrases.zh: 他走进收银亭，先付钱给和气的收银员。

phrases.en: He tells her the pump number and his fuel choice.
phrases.zh: 他告诉她油泵号码和他选的油品。

phrases.en: Back at the car, he opens the little fuel door.
phrases.zh: 回到车旁，他打开小小的油箱盖门。

phrases.en: He twists off the round gas cap and hangs it on the hook.
phrases.zh: 他拧开圆圆的油箱盖，把它挂在挂钩上。

phrases.en: He lifts the heavy nozzle from the pump.
phrases.zh: 他从油泵上提起沉重的加油枪。

phrases.en: He pushes the nozzle firmly into the tank.
phrases.zh: 他把加油枪稳稳地插进油箱口。

phrases.en: He squeezes the trigger and the fuel flows in quietly.
phrases.zh: 他扣动扳机，燃油静静地流进去。

phrases.en: When the tank is full, the nozzle clicks off automatically.
phrases.zh: 油箱加满时，加油枪会自动咔哒一声跳停。

phrases.en: He pulls the nozzle out carefully and hangs it back up.
phrases.zh: 他小心地拔出加油枪，把它挂回原处。

phrases.en: He screws the cap on tightly and shuts the fuel door.
phrases.zh: 他把油箱盖拧紧，关上油箱盖门。

phrases.en: Finally, he starts the engine and drives away happily.
phrases.zh: 最后，他发动汽车，开心地开走了。
